scripts.dev:pages: vite build && wrangler pages dev dist --persist-to=%LOCALAPPDATA%\venezuela-live-wrangler
scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=venezuela-live-2
scripts.db:migrate:local:all: npm run db:migrate:local && npm run db:migrate:local:username
scripts.db:migrate:local:full: npm run db:migrate:local:all && npm run db:migrate:local:proposals && npm run db:migrate:local:seed
scripts.db:migrate:local:gamification: wrangler d1 execute venezuela-live-db --local --persist-to=%LOCALAPPDATA%\venezuela-live-wrangler --file=./migrations/0005_create_achievements.sql && wrangler d1 execute venezuela-live-db --local --persist-to=%LOCALAPPDATA%\venezuela-live-wrangler --file=./migrations/0006_create_user_achievements.sql && wrangler d1 execute venezuela-live-db --local --persist-to=%LOCALAPPDATA%\venezuela-live-wrangler --file=./migrations/0007_add_gamification_to_profiles.sql
scripts.check:apis: npm run db:migrate:local:safe && npm run build
